name: geoservercloud

metadata.name: geoservercloud
metadata.summary: Lightweight Python client to interact with GeoServer Cloud REST API, GeoServer ACL and OGC services

documentation:
# python-geoservercloud

## Installation

From PyPI:

```shell
pip install geoservercloud
```

From git repository:

```shell
poetry install
```

## Quick start

```python
from geoservercloud import GeoServerCloud
geoserver = GeoServerCloud(
    url="http://localhost:9090/geoserver/cloud/",
    user="admin",
    password="geoserver",
)
geoserver.create_workspace("newworkspace")
```

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_workspace
documentation:
Create a workspace in GeoServer, if it does not already exist.
It if exists, update it

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.delete_workspace
documentation: Delete a GeoServer workspace (recursively)

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.recreate_workspace
documentation: Create a workspace in GeoServer, and first delete it if it already exists.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.publish_workspace
documentation: Publish the WMS service for a given workspace

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.set_default_locale_for_service
documentation: Set a default language for localized WMS requests

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.unset_default_locale_for_service
documentation: Remove the default language for localized WMS requests

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_pg_datastore
documentation: Create a PostGIS datastore from the DB connection parameters, or update it if it already exist.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_jndi_datastore
documentation: Create a PostGIS datastore from JNDI resource, or update it if it already exist.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_wmts_store
documentation: Create a cascaded WMTS store, or update it if it already exist.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_feature_type
documentation: Create a feature type or update it if it already exist.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_layer_group
documentation: Create a layer group if it does not already exist.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_wmts_layer
documentation: Publish a remote WMTS layer (first delete it if it already exists)

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_style_from_file
documentation:
Create a style from a file, or update it if it already exists.
Supported file extensions are .sld and .zip.

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_map
documentation: WMS GetMap request

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_feature_info
documentation: WMS GetFeatureInfo request

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_legend_graphic
documentation: WMS GetLegendGraphic request

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_tile
documentation: WMTS GetTile request

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_feature
documentation:
WFS GetFeature request
Return the feature(s) as dict if found, otherwise return the raw response content as bytes

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.describe_feature_type
documentation:
WFS DescribeFeatureType request
Return the feature type(s) as dict if found, otherwise return the raw response content as bytes

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.get_property_value
documentation:
WFS GetPropertyValue request
Return the properties as dict (if one feature was found), a list (if multiple features were found)
or an empty dict if no feature was found. Otherwise throw a requests.exceptions.HTTPError

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.create_gridset
documentation:
Create a gridset for GeoWebCache for a given projection
Supported EPSG codes are 2056, 21781 and 3857

methods.name: geoservercloud.geoservercloud.GeoServerCloud.resource_exists
documentation: Check if a resource (given its path) exists in GeoServer
